name: Proposal Feedback (Blind Evaluation)
about: Blind evaluation of a harness modification proposal (per C-07)
title: 'REVIEW: [Proposal ID] — [verdict: Ship / Fix / Discard]'
labels: review
assignees: ''
---

## Blind Evaluation Declaration
<!-- Per C-07, this evaluation must be blind: you should NOT read the Validator's
     verdict before recording your own. Confirm below. -->

- [ ] I have NOT seen the Validator's evaluation of this proposal.
- [ ] I have NOT seen any other human's evaluation of this proposal.
- [ ] My judgment is my own, based only on the proposal and this Constitution.

## Proposal Under Review
<!-- Link to the proposal PR or issue -->
Proposal: ___

## Quality Scores (1–5 per axis, per Constitution §2.1)

| Axis | Score | Evidence (cite specific text from proposal) |
|------|-------|---------------------------------------------|
| A Correctness | /5 | |
| B Completeness | /5 | |
| C Clarity | /5 | |
| D Reasoning | /5 | |
| E Precision | /5 | |
| F Efficiency | /5 | |
| G Actionability | /5 | |
| H Faithfulness | /5 | |

## Bias Self-Check (Constitution §2.4)
<!-- Check any that might apply and note how you adjusted -->
- [ ] Same-model bias (are you the same model type as the proposer?)
- [ ] Confirmation bias (does this agree with your prior beliefs?)
- [ ] Halo effect (is it well-written but wrong?)
- [ ] Other: ___

## Top 3 Weaknesses
1. ___
2. ___
3. ___

## Verdict
- [ ] **SHIP** — all axes ≥4, no active biases
- [ ] **FIX AND RE-EVAL** — any axis = 3
- [ ] **DISCARD** — any axis ≤2 or Article I violation

<!-- What is the single most important thing the proposer should know? -->
